detail.description:
🧩 Tricky Brain: Annoying Puzzle – Devious, brainy challenges 🧠

Ready for brain tricky puzzles that blend humor and logic? This is a puzzle game where you’ll face tricky brain test setups, pull off prankster moves, and crack wild scenarios like a true prank master. Tackle brain puzzle stages that surprise, delight, and train your brain.

Each level mixes creative riddles with logic twists. Use smart strategies, flip expectations, and keep a cool head through tricky brain puzzles or brain trick
